props.text: aaronjmars/aeon — SHIPPING: huggingface-trending skill lands, reply-maker XAI prefetch unblocks day-13 carrier

props.title: 9c36154 (#162) feat: huggingface-trending — new daily skill pulls trending HF models/datasets/spaces from keyless `/api/{models,datasets,spaces}?sort=trendingScore`, applies six noise filters, tags DEBUT/ACCELERATING/RETURNING/HOLDOVER, clusters into five buckets, forces ≤18-word "why notable" line per pick. 09:30 UTC slot, ships disabled.

795a5a1 (#156) fix(reply-maker): adds `reply-maker)` case to `scripts/prefetch-xai.sh` (numeric → list, `@` → handle, else → topic) and rewrites SKILL.md to read `.xai-cache/reply-maker.json` as Path A. Closes ISS-014 day-13 carrier.
